title: SE2 Lithology Dataset Envelope
description: Shared wrapper for every dataset file in this mod. `resources` is defined as a non-empty array but the per-record shape is validated by a record schema.

version.description: Semver of the dataset schema/contents. Bump on content changes.

generatedAt.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) this file was last updated.

baseGameDataVersion.description: Version of the base-game dataset this mod references.

sources.description: Upstream references the dataset was compiled from.

notes.description: Free-form notes about the dataset's scope, caveats, anomalies.
